name: What are smart home upgrades worth adding during a kitchen remodel in Hillsborough or San Bruno?

mainEntity.name: Which smart home features are actually worth integrating during a kitchen remodel in Hillsborough or San Bruno, and which can be skipped or added later?
mainEntity.text: Which smart home features are actually worth integrating during a kitchen remodel in Hillsborough or San Bruno, and which can be skipped or added later?

acceptedAnswer.text: A kitchen remodel in Hillsborough or San Bruno is a good time to add smart‑home infrastructure that’s hard to retrofit later. Prioritize wiring and power, not gadgets. Add more outlets than you think you need, including some with USB‑C in key prep and seating areas, and ensure circuits are sized for future appliance upgrades. Pre‑wire for under‑cabinet lighting with wall‑box dimmers or smart switches that can later tie into a whole‑home system. If you use voice assistants or in‑ceiling speakers in other rooms, consider running low‑voltage wiring to the kitchen now to keep counters less cluttered. For appliances, you don’t have to buy the most advanced smart models today, but ensure gas, electrical, and water hookups are positioned and sized to accept future replacements without moving cabinets. A dedicated circuit and cabinet space for a future built‑in coffee machine or warming drawer can be planned even if you install a standard cabinet there now. Items like smart faucets, countertop hubs, and plug‑in smart plugs can be added at any time with little disruption. Spending your remodel budget on robust wiring, adequate circuits, and flexible layouts gives you far more long‑term value than chasing the newest gadget features.
acceptedAnswer.description: Valuable kitchen smart upgrades include hard‑wired under‑cabinet lighting controls, plenty of USB‑C/standard outlets, smart‑ready appliance hookups, and pre‑wiring for Wi‑Fi–enabled switches or speakers. Features like smart faucets or integrated tablets are easier to add later. Focus on wiring and power now, since those are hardest to change after walls close.
